goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'moderate' price range and should serve 'swiss' food.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'european' food.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '8 people' at '11:30' on 'saturday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel 'doesn't need to include internet' and 'doesn't need to have free parking'.
The hotel should be in the 'south'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the 'north'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for 'the same group of people' and '3 nights' starting from 'the same day'.
If the booking fails how about '1 nights'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the moderate price range and should serve swiss food
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves european food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 8 people at 11:30 on saturday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to include internet and doesn't need to have free parking
The hotel should be in the south
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the north
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 3 nights starting from the same day
If the booking fails how about 1 nights
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
